spanish: Si cada una tuviera el tamaño de una persona, seríamos más altos que 20 montes Everest.
english: If each one had the size of a person, we would be taller than 20 Mount Everests.
explanation: Past subjunctive (tuviera) + conditional (seríamos) - hypothetical situation in the present

spanish: Si quiere ayudarnos directamente para que hagamos más, puede comprar algo bonito en nuestra tienda.
english: If you want to help us directly so that we make more, you can buy something nice in our store.
explanation: Present subjunctive (hagamos) after 'para que' - expresses purpose

spanish: Dentro de nosotros todos llevamos al menos una de estas células para combatir la primera bacteria mortal que surja en una ciudad de Marte dentro de 100 años.
english: Inside all of us we carry at least one of these cells to fight the first deadly bacteria that emerges in a city on Mars within 100 years.
explanation: Present subjunctive (surja) after relative clause with future uncertainty
